description: Defines an entity's 'angry' state using a timer.

fields.description: The sound event to play when the mob is angry
fields.title: Angry Sound

fields.description: The range of time in seconds to randomly wait before playing the sound again.
fields.title: Sound Interval

fields.description: The amount of time in seconds that the entity will be angry.
fields.title: Duration

fields.description: Variance in seconds added to the duration [-delta, delta].
fields.title: Duration Delta
Anger exemption filters
fields.description: Filter out mob types that it should not attack while angry (other Piglins)
If set, other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange will also become angry
fields.title: Broadcast Anger

fields.description: If set, other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange will also become angry whenever this mob attacks
fields.title: Broadcast Anger On Attack

fields.description: Distance in blocks within which other entities of the same entity type will become angry
fields.title: Broadcast Range

fields.description: A list of entity families to broadcast anger to
fields.title: Broadcast Targets

fields.description: Conditions that make this entry in the list valid
fields.title: Broadcast Filters

fields.description: Event to fire when this entity is calmed down. Can be a simple event name string or an object with event and target properties.
fields.title: Calm Event
Broadcast Anger On Being Attacked
fields.description: If true, other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange will also become angry whenever this mob is attacked

fields.title: Broadcast Anger When Dying
fields.description: If false, when this mob is killed it does not spread its anger to other entities of the same entity definition within the broadcastRange

title: Angry
